sentences.text: Thank you for calling Delta management to help prevent the spread of the coronavirus Kelly management staff will be working from home. Please? Listen as our menu has changed if you are having a life threatening emergency please call nine one one. If you are residential tenant with a maintenance emergency, please contact the emergency hotline at two zero. Two two nine six eight four two five, if you are residential tenant with any other concerns, please contact your building manager by email or phone for any other issues. Please leave a voicemail or email receptionist at Galvin. Dot. Com. All voice mails left on our Bay line as well as the voice mails left on the mailboxes of individual staff will be returned for a directory listing of staff. Please press pound. Thank you have a nice day for a first name company directory please press one for our last name please press two. Thank you for calling Ganley manage. The number entered is not valid. Thank you for calling Ganley management. If you know you're for a first name company directory please press one for our last name company directory please press two. Using the keys on your telephone. Please spell the first name of the person then press pound for the letter Q press seven. Harrison Miller if this is correct press pound for the previous name in the directory press. You've reached Harrison Miller. Please leave a message and I'll return your call as soon as POS.

conversation.title: Call: Andy Keefe and Harrison Miller @ Gelman Management, Inc.
